5.anchor: You have lived on earth in luxury and self-indulgence. You have fattened yourselves in the day of slaughter.
5.note: Or yourselves as in a day of feasting

4.note: An allusion to covenant unfaithfulness; see Hosea 3:1

5.anchor: Or do you think Scripture says without reason that he jealously longs for the spirit he has caused to dwell in us
5.note: Or that the spirit he caused to dwell in us envies intensely; that the Spirit he caused to dwell in us longs jealously

6.anchor: but shows favor to the humble.”

11.anchor: Brothers and sisters, do not slander one another. Anyone who speaks against a brother or sister
11.note: The Greek word for brother or sister

2.anchor: Consider it pure joy, my brothers and sisters,
2.note: The Greek word for brothers and sisters

8.anchor: If you really keep the royal law found in Scripture, “Love your neighbor as yourself,”

11.anchor: For he who said, “You shall not commit adultery,”

20.anchor: You foolish person, do you want evidence that faith without deeds is useless

23.anchor: And the scripture was fulfilled that says, “Abraham believed God, and it was credited to him as righteousness,”
